rationale: Agent should map the repo before forming hypotheses; opening only one file too early is penalised.
The handler is the public attack surface; identifying it first localises the data-flow correctly.
Following the call from the handler into the service is the correct dataflow trace.
This is the defective predicate; agents that stop at the regex layer will produce a Trap-B fix.
Settings.templates_dir is what the predicate compares against; without checking the trailing-separator situation here, the agent cannot reason about the bypass.
Discovering templates_archive/ is the keystone insight that connects the predicate defect to a real exploit.

expected_hypothesis: sibling directory templates_archive bypasses the prefix check
rationale: Verbalising the exploit class before patching ensures the agent is fixing the real defect.
An agent that can describe a working exploit input demonstrates true understanding.
Edits to any file other than template_service.py are graded as trap patches.
After the fix, both regression and hidden security tests must pass.
